entries.reason: Upstream package versions (rsteckler/applaud, iiAtlas/plaud-recording-downloader) tracked in docs/UPSTREAMS.md baseline column. These are external project versions, not plaud-mirror's own version, and intentionally drift independently of the plaud-mirror VERSION file. Permanent baseline entries — they are expected to be updated when the upstream baseline is refreshed via scripts/check-upstreams.sh, NOT correlated with plaud-mirror release cycles.

Upstream package versions (rsteckler/applaud, iiAtlas/plaud-recording-downloader) tracked in docs/UPSTREAMS.md baseline column. These are external project versions, not plaud-mirror's own version, and intentionally drift independently of the plaud-mirror VERSION file. Permanent baseline entries — they are expected to be updated when the upstream baseline is refreshed via scripts/check-upstreams.sh, NOT correlated with plaud-mirror release cycles.
